mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chatroom (member_id, chatroom_title, chatroom_max_member) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{chatroomTitle}, #{chatroomMaxMember})
mapper.select: SELECT chatroom_id AS chatroomId, member_id AS memberId, chatroom_title AS chatroomTitle, chatroom_max_member AS chatroomMaxMember, chatroom_created_at AS chatroomCreatedAt FROM chatroom WHERE chatroom_id = #{chatroomId}

SELECT chatroom_id AS chatroomId, member_id AS memberId, chatroom_title AS chatroomTitle, chatroom_max_member AS chatroomMaxMember, chatroom_created_at AS chatroomCreatedAt FROM chatroom ORDER BY chatroom_created_at DESC
